emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Flannery's Hotel Galway website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 54/100
========================================

7 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- No SSL
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No viewport meta
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 14 inline styles
 HIGH
--------------------
- Broken reservation system
 HIGH
--------------------
- Not responsive
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No analytics
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Images oversized


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: No SSL
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: No viewport meta
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: 14 inline styles
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.label: Broken reservation system
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: The website layout breaks on mobile and tablet screens.
issues.label: Not responsive
issues.check: Resize your browser to 375px width (iPhone SE). Does content overflow?
issues.siteHint: Google penalizes non-responsive sites in mobile search rankings.

issues.detail: Without analytics, you can't track traffic sources, popular pages, or conversion rates.
issues.label: No analytics
issues.check: Install the Tag Assistant extension and check if GA or similar is detected.
issues.siteHint: You can't improve what you don't measure.

issues.label: Images oversized
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.
